creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 203643
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support din-41 builds.

DIN Is Noise has been updated from version 39.0.1 to version 41.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building din-41.

Additional changes:

* Modified the USES= to include sdl to prevent warnings of deprecated usage of USES_SDL=yes alone.


It would be nice if the patch can be applied to the ports tree of FreeBSD.

Thank you
Santhosh
